message:
bd-ml2r: optimize centrality lookup O(n²)->O(n) + xychart category padding

Performance:
- Build HashMap<node_index, CentralityTier> once before node render loop
- Use O(1) hash lookup instead of O(n) linear search per node
- Total rendering time for large graphs improved from O(n²) to O(n)

Bug fix:
- xychart_categories: pad missing categories when series has more values
  than explicit category labels, generating numeric fallback labels

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
